result: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure universal access to quality education. Education has the power to break cycles of poverty, empower individuals, promote understanding and tolerance, and drive sustainable development. By providing everyone with the tools and knowledge they need to succeed, we could create a more equitable, innovative, and harmonious world.
